goal: Configure a Franka Panda arm for MoveIt2 + isaac_ros_cumotion motion planning through Isaac Sim's ROS2 bridge. Step 1: precheck_ros2_environment to confirm rclpy + rosbridge port 9090 reachable. Step 2: robot_wizard to load Franka. Step 3: setup_ros2_control_compat to wire /isaac_joint_states + /isaac_joint_commands topics (franka_panda controller type). Step 4: emit_ros2_control_yaml to write the ros2_control YAML a downstream colcon workspace needs. Step 5: setup_isaac_ros_cumotion_moveit to emit the MoveIt2 planning_pipeline YAML with the cumotion plugin (planner_id='cuMotion', max_planning_time=5.0). Step 6: setup_ros2_bridge profile=franka_moveit2 to build the OmniGraph that binds joint-state publisher, trajectory subscriber, TF, and clock. Step 7: configure_ros2_time to lock sim clock to /clock at 1000 Hz. Step 8: ros2_list_topics to verify /isaac_joint_states, /isaac_joint_commands, /clock are live. Step 9: diagnose_ros2 to confirm QoS health. Exercises the full Phase 6 M1+M4 MoveIt2 integration path — distinct from CP-NEW-ros2-bridge-franka which validates basic topic plumbing only.
thoughts:
Design rationale for CP-NEW-ros2-moveit2-franka:

1) Why distinct from CP-NEW-ros2-bridge-franka: The existing bridge template exercises setup_ros2_bridge + configure_ros2_time + emit_ros2_control_yaml and stops at topic-existence verification. This template exercises the M1+M4 planning pipeline: setup_ros2_control_compat (topic renaming for ros2_control compatibility) + setup_isaac_ros_cumotion_moveit (MoveIt2 YAML with cumotion plugin). These two tools do not appear in any other canonical.

2) Tool chain order matters: precheck_ros2_environment must fire before any bridge setup; configure_ros2_time must fire before setup_ros2_bridge (clock=0 edge case in existing bridge template); setup_ros2_control_compat before emit_ros2_control_yaml so topic names are consistent; setup_isaac_ros_cumotion_moveit after robot_wizard (needs articulation path to find joint names).

3) cumotion planner config: planner_id='cuMotion', max_planning_time=5.0s, goal_tolerance_pos_m=0.001, goal_tolerance_orient_rad=0.01. These are MoveIt2-side configs — they go into the emitted YAML, not into cuRobo directly.

4) Physics: CPU dynamics (MBP, no GPU) for deterministic joint-state output. Franka at [0,0,0.75] on table. Scene is minimal — the focus is middleware, not manipulation.

5) Verification strategy: ros2_list_topics checks topic existence; diagnose_ros2 checks QoS and DDS domain. No sim_control play needed — bridge is middleware-only; physical simulation not required for topic verification.

6) Roles: single Franka arm, no workpieces or conveyors. Motion controller = ros2_control (external MoveIt2 node).
code:
# ── Preflight: ROS2 environment check ────────────────────────────────────────
precheck_ros2_environment(rosbridge_port=9090)

# ── Scene skeleton ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# Robot mount table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

# ── Physics: CPU determinism ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

# ── Franka Panda ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# ── M1: ros2_control topic compatibility ─────────────────────────────────────
# Maps Isaac Sim bridge to ros2_control-standard topic names that MoveIt2 expects.
setup_ros2_control_compat(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller",
)

# ── M1: emit ros2_control YAML for downstream colcon workspace ────────────────
emit_ros2_control_yaml(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller",
    output_path="/tmp/franka_ros2_control.yaml",
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    update_rate_hz=1000,
)

# ── M4: MoveIt2 planning_pipeline YAML with cumotion plugin ──────────────────
setup_isaac_ros_cumotion_moveit(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    output_dir="/tmp/franka_moveit2_config",
    planner_id="cuMotion",
    max_planning_time=5.0,
    goal_tolerance_pos_m=0.001,
    goal_tolerance_orient_rad=0.01,
)

# ── ROS2 clock — must precede OmniGraph bridge build ─────────────────────────
configure_ros2_time(mode="sim_time")

# ── OmniGraph bridge: franka_moveit2 profile ─────────────────────────────────
# Builds joint-state publisher, trajectory subscriber, TF, and clock nodes.
setup_ros2_bridge(
    profile="franka_moveit2",
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    graph_path="/World/ROS2_MoveIt2_Bridge",
)

# ── Verification: topic presence ─────────────────────────────────────────────
ros2_list_topics()

# ── Verification: QoS + DDS health ───────────────────────────────────────────
diagnose_ros2()
failure_modes: ROS2 environment not sourced before Kit launch — precheck_ros2_environment returns ok=False; source /opt/ros/humble/setup.bash then restart Kit.
setup_ros2_control_compat called before robot_wizard — no articulation at /World/Franka yet; joint name discovery returns empty list; always call robot_wizard first.
configure_ros2_time called after setup_ros2_bridge — /clock messages emit timestamp=0 for first N sim steps; always call configure_ros2_time before setup_ros2_bridge.
setup_isaac_ros_cumotion_moveit output_dir not writable — YAML not written but no exception raised; downstream MoveIt2 launch will fail to find planning_pipeline config.
QoS mismatch: bridge publishes RELIABLE on /isaac_joint_states, MoveIt2 subscriber set to BEST_EFFORT — diagnose_ros2 reports qos_mismatch; fix MoveIt2 QoS override in its node params.
franka_moveit2 bridge profile not found — setup_ros2_bridge raises KeyError if Isaac Sim version predates Phase 6 graph templates; fall back to manual configure_ros2_bridge.
code_template:
precheck_ros2_environment(rosbridge_port=9090)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[0.6, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})
robot_wizard(
    robot_name={{primary_robot.class}},
    dest_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    position={{primary_robot.position}},
    orientation={{primary_robot.orientation}},
)
setup_ros2_control_compat(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller",
)
emit_ros2_control_yaml(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    controller_type="joint_trajectory_controller",
    output_path="/tmp/franka_ros2_control.yaml",
    joint_states_topic="/isaac_joint_states",
    joint_commands_topic="/isaac_joint_commands",
    update_rate_hz=1000,
)
setup_isaac_ros_cumotion_moveit(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    output_dir="/tmp/franka_moveit2_config",
    planner_id="cuMotion",
    max_planning_time=5.0,
    goal_tolerance_pos_m=0.001,
    goal_tolerance_orient_rad=0.01,
)
configure_ros2_time(mode="sim_time")
setup_ros2_bridge(profile="franka_moveit2", robot_path={{primary_robot.path}}, graph_path="/World/ROS2_MoveIt2_Bridge")
ros2_list_topics()
diagnose_ros2()
